de-rotkaeppchen: A girl is called Little Red Riding Hood.
The mother says: "Go to grandmother! She is sick. Bring her food!" Little Red Riding Hood goes into the forest.
In the forest she meets a wolf.
The wolf asks: "Where are you going?" Little Red Riding Hood says: "To grandmother." The wolf runs quickly to grandmother's house.
He goes inside and lies down in the bed.
Little Red Riding Hood comes and asks: "Grandmother, why do you have such big eyes?" The wolf leaps out of the bed!
A hunter comes and helps Little Red Riding Hood.
de-haensel-gretel: Hansel and Gretel are two children.
The family is poor and has no food.
The father brings the children into the forest.
The children are alone and afraid.
The house is made of chocolate and cake!
In the house lives an old woman.
Gretel opens the door of the oven.
The evil woman falls into the oven.
They live together and are happy.
de-froschkoenig: A princess is playing with a golden ball.
The ball falls into the water.
The princess is sad and cries.
A frog comes and says: "I can fetch the ball. But you must eat with me and I want to sleep in your bed." The princess says: "Yes, okay." The frog fetches the ball from the water.
The frog comes to the house and knocks on the door.
The father says: "You must keep your promise!" The princess is angry and throws the frog against the wall.
Then the frog becomes a prince!
de-rapunzel: An evil woman takes a small girl.
The woman brings Rapunzel to a tall tower.
Every day the woman calls: "Rapunzel, let down your hair!" And Rapunzel throws her hair out of the window.
He calls too: "Rapunzel, let down your hair!" He climbs up.
Rapunzel and the prince are happy.
de-bremer-stadtmusikanten: His owner no longer wants him.
He wants to make music there.
On the way he meets a dog, a cat, and a rooster.
They are also old and sad.
In the evening they see a house.
In the house are thieves with lots of food.
The donkey stands at the bottom, the dog stands on the donkey, the cat on the dog, and the rooster right at the top.
The thieves are frightened and run away!
The four animals stay in the house and live happily together.
da-den-grimme-aelling: But one duckling is big and ugly.
The other animals laugh at him.
He runs away from the farm.
He is alone in the forest.
The winter is long and cold.
In spring he sees beautiful birds on the lake.
He flies over to the swans.
He sees himself in the water.
da-tommelise: A woman wishes for a little child.
A fairy gives her a seed.
From the seed grows a beautiful flower.
Inside the flower sits a little girl.
At night a big toad takes her.
The toad wants to marry Thumbelina.
But Thumbelina does not want to.
She sails away on a leaf.
A swallow finds her in the forest.
The swallow flies with her to a warm country.
There she meets a little elf.
They get married and are happy.
da-den-lille-havfrue: A young mermaid lives under the sea.
She can see the stars at night.
She dreams of walking on land.
One day she sees a prince on a ship.
She goes to a witch for help.
But the mermaid loses her voice.
She does not want to harm the prince.
She jumps into the sea and turns into foam.
da-kejserens-nye-klaeder: They say: We can sew the most beautiful clothes in the world.
But foolish people cannot see them.
His ministers say: What beautiful clothes!
The emperor walks in a parade.
A little child shouts: He has no clothes on!
da-fyrtojet: A soldier comes home from the war.
An old witch meets him on the road.
The witch says: Climb up the tree and fetch a tinderbox!
The soldier climbed up the tree.
He found the tinderbox and lots of gold.
He took everything and killed the witch.
He travelled to a big city.
One day he lit the tinderbox.
The soldier wished to see the beautiful princess.
The soldier and the princess got married.
